// What We Do

Everything Your Business
Needs to Run Smarter

From one-off apps to full managed IT — we're your technology partner at every stage.

⚡

Custom App Development

We build web apps, internal tools, client portals, and mobile applications tailored exactly to your business needs — no off-the-shelf compromises.

Web AppsMobileInternal ToolsPortals
🔄

Workflow & Process Automation

Eliminate manual, repetitive tasks. We automate your business processes — invoicing, reporting, data entry, notifications, and more — saving you hours every week.

Zapier/MakeRPAAPI AutomationScheduling
🛡

Managed IT Support

Proactive monitoring, helpdesk support, and IT management for your team. We keep your systems running so downtime never costs you business.

HelpdeskMonitoringSecurityBackup
🔗

System Integration

Connect your existing tools — CRMs, ERPs, payment systems, and third-party APIs — so your data flows seamlessly and nothing falls through the cracks.

REST APIsCRM/ERPWebhooksData Sync
☁️

Cloud Setup & Migration

Move your business to the cloud or optimize what you already have. We handle setup, migration, and ongoing management for AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

AWSAzureGoogle CloudMigration
🧭

Tech Consulting & Strategy

Not sure what you need? We help you map out a technology roadmap that matches your business goals and budget — no jargon, just practical advice.

RoadmappingVendor SelectionDigital Strategy
// Why Suretek

We're Not a Faceless Agency.
We're Your Tech Partner.

Small businesses deserve the same powerful technology as enterprises — without the bloat, the delays, or the run-around.

⚡

Fast Turnaround

Most projects scoped and kicked off within 1 week. We move as fast as your business does.

💬

Direct Communication

You talk directly to the person building your solution. No account managers, no middlemen.

📐

Built Around Your Business

Every solution is custom-built for how you actually work — not a template forced to fit.

🔒

Transparent Pricing

Fixed-price projects and clear retainer options. No surprise invoices, no scope creep traps.

📈

Results-Focused

We measure success by the time and money we save you — not the hours we bill.

$0
Cost of a free initial consultation
✓ No long-term contracts required
✓ Flat-rate project pricing available
✓ You own all code & intellectual property
✓ Ongoing support after project delivery
✓ NDA available upon request
✓ Local business, real accountability
// How It Works

From Idea to Live System
in 4 Simple Steps

A proven process that keeps you informed and in control at every stage — no surprises.

01

Discovery Call

We start with a free 30-minute conversation to understand your needs, goals, and current challenges.

02

Proposal & Scope

You receive a clear, fixed-price proposal with timeline, deliverables, and exactly what's included.

03

Build & Review

We build in sprints with regular check-ins. You review progress and give feedback throughout.

04

Launch & Support

We deploy your solution, provide training, and offer ongoing support to keep everything running smoothly.

// See It In Action

Suretek Job Scheduler
Custom workflow automation — schedule and manage jobs with priority and retry control.
Network & Jobs Dashboard
Real-time network monitoring with bandwidth graphs and device uptime tracking.
System Resource Monitor
Live CPU, memory, disk, and network monitoring with historical graphs and per-core breakdowns.
Vehicle Maintenance Tracker
Full vehicle service dashboard with maintenance timelines, recall tracking, and upcoming service schedules.
// Investment

Simple, Honest Pricing

Choose what fits your needs — or contact us for a custom quote on larger projects.

Starter
$500 / project
Ideal for small automations, simple integrations, or script-based tools.
  • ✓ 1 workflow or integration
  • ✓ Up to 2 revision rounds
  • ✓ Basic documentation
  • ✓ 30-day support window
Get Started
MOST POPULAR
Professional
$2,500 / project
Full custom apps, complex automations, or system integrations for growing businesses.
  • ✓ Full custom build
  • ✓ Unlimited revision rounds
  • ✓ Full documentation & training
  • ✓ 90-day support window
  • ✓ Source code ownership
Get Started
Managed IT Retainer
$499 / month
Ongoing IT support, monitoring, and maintenance for your business systems.
  • ✓ Proactive monitoring
  • ✓ Helpdesk (up to 10 hrs/mo)
  • ✓ Security updates & patches
  • ✓ Monthly reporting
  • ✓ Priority response
